sentence: 经济面临结构性问题。
pinyin: Jīngjì miànlín jiégòuxìng wèntí.
english: The economy faces structural problems.

sentence: 金融市场今天波动较大。
pinyin: Jīnróng shìchǎng jīntiān bōdòng jiào dà.
english: The financial market saw large fluctuations today.

sentence: 医护人员连续工作了十几个小时。
pinyin: Yīhù rényuán liánxù gōngzuò le shí jǐ gè xiǎoshí.
english: Medical personnel worked continuously for more than ten hours.

sentence: 这首歌勾起了他浓浓的乡情。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē gōu qǐ le tā nóngnóng de xiāng qíng.
english: This song stirred up a deep feeling of homesickness in him.

meaning: 1. hungry and thirsty; 2. (fig.) to crave (knowledge, love etc);horny
sentence: 长跑后他感到饥渴难忍。
pinyin: Cháng pǎo hòu tā gǎndào jīkě nán rěn.
english: After the long run, he felt unbearably hungry and thirsty.

sentence: 这道题涉及一维运动。
pinyin: Zhè dào tí shèjí yī wéi yùndòng.
english: This problem involves one-dimensional motion.

sentence: 他不忍心丢下生病的猫。
pinyin: Tā bù rěn xīn diū xia shēngbìng de māo.
english: He cannot bear to abandon the sick cat.

meaning: 1. collar; 2. neckband; 3. neckline; 4. the place where the two ends o
sentence: 她的衬衫领口有一个小污渍。
pinyin: Tā de chènshān lǐngkǒu yǒu yī gè xiǎo wūzì.
english: Her shirt has a small stain at the neckline.

sentence: 副总裁试图在公司内部夺权。
pinyin: Fù zǒngcái shìtú zài gōngsī nèibù duóquán.
english: The vice president attempted to seize power within the company.

meaning: 1. to fish for (aquatic animals and plants); 2. to catch
sentence: 这片海域禁止过度捕捞鱼类。
pinyin: Zhè piàn hǎiyù jìnzhǐ guòdù bǔlāo yúlèi.
english: Overfishing is prohibited in this sea area.

sentence: 太阳风会影响地球的磁场。
pinyin: Tàiyángfēng huì yǐngxiǎng dìqiú de cíchǎng.
english: Solar wind can affect Earth's magnetic field.

sentence: 老式收音机可以接收长波信号。
pinyin: Lǎoshì shōuyīnjī kěyǐ jiēshōu chángbō xìnhào.
english: Old-fashioned radios can receive longwave signals.

sentence: 他把工资付给了房东。
pinyin: Tā bǎ gōngzī fù gěi le fángdōng.
english: He paid his wages to the landlord.

sentence: 超市的大米被抢购一空。
pinyin: Chāoshì de dàmǐ bèi qiǎnggòu yī kōng.
english: The rice at the supermarket was bought out completely.

meaning: 1. to stand in a circle and watch
sentence: 街上发生了事故，许多人围观。
pinyin: Jiē shàng fāshēng le shìgù, xǔduō rén wéiguān.
english: An accident happened on the street and many people gathered to watch.

sentence: 这两种产品同质化严重。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng zhǒng chǎnpǐn tóngzhì huà yánzhòng.
english: These two products are highly homogeneous.

sentence: 炼钢需要先将生铁进行提纯。
pinyin: Liàn gāng xūyào xiān jiāng shēngtiě jìnxíng tíchún.
english: Steel smelting requires purifying pig iron first.

sentence: 片中的主角是一位年轻的老师。
pinyin: Piàn zhōng de zhǔjué shì yī wèi niánqīng de lǎoshī.
english: The main character in the film is a young teacher.

sentence: 听到这首歌，她感到一阵忧伤。
pinyin: Tīng dào zhè shǒu gē, tā gǎndào yī zhèn yōushāng.
english: Hearing this song, she was overcome with grief.

meaning: 1. to visit (a meeting, class, trial etc)
sentence: 她申请旁听了一节大学公开课。
pinyin: Tā shēnqǐng pángtīng le yī jié dàxué gōngkāikè.
english: She applied to sit in on a university open lecture.

meaning: 1. to study on one's own; 2. self-study
sentence: 他利用空余时间自修英语。
pinyin: Tā lìyòng kòngyú shíjiān zìxiū Yīngyǔ.
english: He uses his free time to study English on his own.

sentence: 节日的街道装饰得多彩多姿。
pinyin: Jiérì de jiēdào zhuāngshì de duōcǎi duōzī.
english: The festival streets are decorated in a colorful and lively way.

meaning: 1. to live to the (ripe) age of
sentence: 老先生享年九十三岁。
pinyin: Lǎo xiānsheng xiǎng nián jiǔshísān suì.
english: The elderly gentleman lived to the ripe age of ninety-three.

sentence: 服务员很快就来上菜了。
pinyin: Fúwùyuán hěn kuài jiù lái shàng cài le.
english: The waiter came to serve the food very quickly.

meaning: 1. to go straight; 2. straight forward; 3. fig. to do right
sentence: 到路口后直行三百米就到了。
pinyin: Dào lùkǒu hòu zhíxíng sānbǎi mǐ jiù dào le.
english: After reaching the intersection, go straight for three hundred meters and you'll be there.

meaning: 1. to act in a play; 2. to put on a play
sentence: 她的哭泣不过是在做戏。
pinyin: Tā de kūqì bùguò shì zài zuòxì.
english: Her crying was nothing more than putting on an act.

sentence: 湖边停着许多不同种类的水鸟。
pinyin: Hú biān tíng zhe xǔduō bùtóng zhǒnglèi de shuǐniǎo.
english: Many different kinds of waterbirds are resting by the lake.

sentence: 突击队迅速控制了现场局面。
pinyin: Tūjīduì xùnsù kòngzhì le xiànchǎng júmiàn.
english: The commando unit quickly took control of the scene.

sentence: 签合同前要审慎考虑每一条款。
pinyin: Qiān hétóng qián yào shěnshèn kǎolǜ měi yī tiáokuǎn.
english: You should carefully consider every clause before signing a contract.

sentence: 这台设备需要在低压环境下运行。
pinyin: Zhè tái shèbèi xūyào zài dīyā huánjìng xià yùnxíng.
english: This equipment needs to operate in a low-pressure environment.

sentence: 这位银行家管理着数十亿资产。
pinyin: Zhè wèi yínhángjiā guǎnlǐ zhe shù shí yì zīchǎn.
english: This banker manages assets worth billions.

sentence: 申请人需要提交完整的材料。
pinyin: Shēnqǐngrén xūyào tíjiāo wánzhěng de cáiliào.
english: The applicant needs to submit complete documents.

sentence: 他用软件解码了这段信息。
pinyin: Tā yòng ruǎnjiàn jiěmǎ le zhè duàn xìnxī.
english: He used software to decode this message.

meaning: 1. to refer to; 2. to be used in place of
sentence: 这里的"他"指代的是谁？
pinyin: Zhèlǐ de "tā" zhǐdài de shì shuí?
english: Who does "he" refer to here?

sentence: 仓库里的物料快用完了，需要补货。
pinyin: Cāngkù lǐ de wùliào kuài yòngwán le, xūyào bǔ huò.
english: The materials in the warehouse are almost used up and need to be restocked.

meaning: the most senior minister of many kingdoms or dynasties (with varying r
sentence: 诸葛亮是三国时期蜀汉的丞相。
pinyin: Zhūgě Liàng shì Sānguó shíqī Shǔhàn de chéngxiàng.
english: Zhuge Liang was the prime minister of Shu Han during the Three Kingdoms period.

meaning: (literary) that person (usually female); she; one's intended
sentence: 蒹葭苍苍，白露为霜，所谓伊人，在水一方。
pinyin: Jiānjiā cāngcāng, báilù wéi shuāng, suǒ wèi yī rén, zài shuǐ yī fāng.
english: The reeds are green, white dew turns to frost — that person I long for is somewhere across the water.

sentence: 花的子房发育后会变成果实。
pinyin: Huā de zǐfáng fāyù hòu huì biànchéng guǒshí.
english: The ovary of a flower develops into a fruit.

sentence: 这个词指称的范围比较广，用法灵活。
pinyin: Zhège cí zhǐchēng de fànwéi bǐjiào guǎng, yòngfǎ línghuó.
english: The reference range of this word is quite broad and its usage is flexible.

sentence: 那个时代的国运与每个普通人都息息相关。
pinyin: Nàge shídài de guóyùn yǔ měi gè pǔtōng rén dōu xīxī xiāngguān.
english: In that era, the fate of the nation was closely tied to every ordinary person.

meaning: to reply (by letter, email etc); reply; answer
sentence: 我发了邮件，等了两天才收到他的回覆。
pinyin: Wǒ fā le yóujiàn, děng le liǎng tiān cái shōudào tā de huífù.
english: I sent an email and waited two days before receiving his reply.

sentence: 她在游泳世锦赛上夺得了金牌。
pinyin: Tā zài yóuyǒng shì jǐn sài shàng duódé le jīnpái.
english: She won a gold medal at the World Swimming Championships.

sentence: 网站的伺服器出故障了，页面打不开。
pinyin: Wǎngzhàn de cìfúqì chū gùzhàng le, yèmiàn dǎ bù kāi.
english: The website's server broke down and the page won't load.

sentence: 受疫情影响，旅游业去年出现了负增长。
pinyin: Shòu yìqíng yǐngxiǎng, lǚyóuyè qùnián chūxiàn le fù zēngzhǎng.
english: Affected by the pandemic, the tourism industry experienced negative growth last year.

sentence: 他把钱包放在外套内侧的口袋里。
pinyin: Tā bǎ qiánbāo fàng zài wàitào nèicè de kǒudài lǐ.
english: He put his wallet in the inside pocket of his jacket.

meaning: (agriculture) to begin sowing; (of a radio or TV station) to start bro
sentence: 这部新剧下周一正式开播，很多人都在等。
pinyin: Zhè bù xīnjù xià zhōu yī zhèngshì kāi bō, hěn duō rén dōu zài děng.
english: This new drama officially starts airing next Monday and many people are looking forward to it.

sentence: 她在业内工作了十多年，经验很丰富。
pinyin: Tā zài yè nèi gōngzuò le shí duō nián, jīngyàn hěn fēngfù.
english: She has been working in the industry for over ten years and has a wealth of experience.

sentence: 这座城市有大量华人侨民聚居。
pinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì yǒu dàliàng Huárén qiáomín jùjū.
english: This city has a large community of overseas Chinese residents.

sentence: 这所学校采用的是六年制小学学制。
pinyin: Zhè suǒ xuéxiào cǎiyòng de shì liù nián zhì xiǎoxué xuézhì.
english: This school follows a six-year primary education system.

meaning: racing driver (in a car race); rider (in a motorcycle or bicycle race)
sentence: 这位车手在最后一圈超越了对手，夺得冠军。
pinyin: Zhè wèi chēshǒu zài zuìhòu yī quān chāoyuè le duìshǒu, duódé guànjūn.
english: This driver overtook his rival in the final lap to win the championship.
